_notes: Source: AU Core Condition (Australian realm). Target: R4 base Condition. AU Core is more constrained: it makes category and code mandatory (min=1), adds MS on clinicalStatus/verificationStatus/severity/subject/onset/abatement/note, restricts onset[x] and abatement[x] types to exclude string, uses Australian-specific VS bindings on code/bodySite/severity, and adds an error constraint on bodySite. Going source→target (R4 base), all source-specific constraints relax or change to R4 defaults. R4 defines wider types for onset/abatement (includes string), example bindings on code/bodySite, preferred on severity, and no error constraint on bodySite.

drifts.description: clinicalStatus MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport on clinicalStatus.
verificationStatus MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport on verificationStatus.
category cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
category MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.
severity MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

severity binding strength weakened: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity). Same value set, binding strength weakened from extensible to preferred.
code cardinality relaxed: source [1..1] → target [0..1]. Min decreased from 1 to 0.
code MustSupport removed on a previously required (min=1) element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

code binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-condition-1) [AU clinical condition VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code) [R4 example VS]. Different value sets and binding strength weakened from extensible to example.

Source constraint au-core-cond-01(error) on bodySite removed in target: AU Core defines an error constraint requiring bodySite to be from a specific hierarchy when present; R4 base has no such constraint on bodySite.

bodySite binding changed: source extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/body-site-1) [AU body site VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site) [R4 example VS]. Different value sets and binding strength weakened from extensible to example.

subject MustSupport removed on required element (both source and target have min=1; source inherits min=1 from R4, target explicitly declares min=1): source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

subject reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-patient (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-patient) → target R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group). Target widens reference to include Group and uses base R4 resources.
onset[x] MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

onset[x] types widened in target: source restricts types to [dateTime, Age, Period, Range] (excludes string); target R4 includes [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. String type added back in target, widening the permitted types.
abatement[x] MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

abatement[x] types widened in target: source restricts types to [dateTime, Age, Period, Range] (excludes string); target R4 includes [dateTime, Age, Period, Range, string]. String type added back in target, widening the permitted types.
note MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true; R4 base differential has no mustSupport.

evidence.code binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/clinical-finding-1) [AU clinical finding VS] → target example(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/manifestation-or-symptom) [R4 base VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced by R4 base VS.
